subject: fix(build): remove broken import of deleted src/constants/Colors
body:
tailwind.config.js imported ./src/constants/Colors which was deleted
in the previous commit. The import spread old scaffold colors (light/
dark theme tints) that were fully superseded by styles/theme.js.
Removing the dead require and spread fixes the Vercel build.

Tags: build, bugfix
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 5
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-quality
Semver: patch
